name: openpanels
description: Codex-first local agent panels for artifacts, canvas, markdown, and images.

interface.shortDescription: Open project-backed canvas panels inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: OpenPanels packages a native Codex widget, MCP tools, and skills so agents can open a local canvas workspace, read selections, insert generated images, and persist everything under the active project's .openpanels directory.
defaultPrompt: Use the current OpenPanels canvas selection as image context.
Insert the generated image into OpenPanels.
